'''gagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:planimetrically|planimetrically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-g-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:planimetrically|planimetrically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gagate|gagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gagatesher|gagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gagatesherĂ«m|gagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gagatero|gagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gagateshĂ«|gagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gagateshĂ«m|gagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigagatero|gokigagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigagateshĂ«|gokigagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigagateshĂ«m|gokigagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogagankerom|gogagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogagankeshĂ«|gogagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogagankeshĂ«m|gogagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogagankeya|gogagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gagaterom|gagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gagatemu|gagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gagateya|gagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigagaterom|gokigagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigagatemu|gokigagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigagateya|gokigagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gagagate|gagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gagagatesher|gagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gagagatesherĂ«m|gagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gagagatero|gagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gagagateshĂ«|gagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gagagateshĂ«m|gagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigagagatero|gokigagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigagagateshĂ«|gokigagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigagagateshĂ«m|gokigagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogagagankerom|gogagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogagagankeshĂ«|gogagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogagagankeshĂ«m|gogagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogagagankeya|gogagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gagagaterom|gagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gagagatemu|gagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gagagateya|gagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigagagaterom|gokigagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigagagatemu|gokigagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigagagateya|gokigagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠgĂŠte|gĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠgĂŠtesher|gĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠgĂŠtero|gĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠgĂŠtero|gokigĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gogĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠgĂŠterom|gĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠgĂŠtemu|gĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠgĂŠteya|gĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠgĂŠterom|gokigĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠgĂŠteya|gokigĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafgafte|gafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafgaftesher|gafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafgaftesherĂ«m|gafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafgaftero|gafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafgafteshĂ«|gafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafgafteshĂ«m|gafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafgaftero|gokigafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafgafteshĂ«|gokigafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafgafteshĂ«m|gokigafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafgafnkerom|gogafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafgafnkeshĂ«|gogafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafgafnkeshĂ«m|gogafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafgafnkeya|gogafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafgafterom|gafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafgaftemu|gafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafgafteya|gafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafgafterom|gokigafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafgaftemu|gokigafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafgafteya|gokigafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
